description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, cylindrical black metal barrel and a classic wooden stock. The stock is full-sized, featuring a smooth, slightly curved design with a reddish-brown wood grain finish. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a simple open sight mounted on top. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The overall construction appears solid and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a utilitarian appearance. The shotgun's components are tightly integrated, with visible screws and mechanical joints.
description: A sturdy shotgun with a black metal barrel and a full wooden stock, featuring a rounded trigger guard and open sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, black barrel, and open sight on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock and the metallic barrel, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the top-mounted sight.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
